live_status_gate.detail: inferBaseStatus() requires hasPrice=true AND Binance source. Unknown sources get fallback. Live downgrades to delayed at 5min. Verified by logic simulation.

label_centralization.detail: data-status.ts covers Canlı/Gecikmeli/AYC Veri/Veri yok. Missing from module: 'Veri yetersiz' (in AssetDetailModal local fn), 'Demo' (hardcoded in social/page.tsx). No runtime truth failure, but two separate label paths.

price_display_consistency.detail: Market page uses buildDataStatusMeta. Dashboard uses freshPriceCount/45s own logic. MarketTicker uses 90s own logic. AssetDetailModal assigns 'live' on price response without TTL.

analysis_gating.detail: hasSufficientData gates target/stop/RR in AssetDetailModal. Scenario route nulls Kelly/probability/RR/PnL for fallback, returns empty for insufficient.

performance_zero_state.detail: No gold bar when stats.total===0. Gold segment only when stats.pending>0.

social_radar_percentages.qa_finding: INCORRECT — bull+bear exceeded 100 in 351/1610 combinations (max sum=126)
social_radar_percentages.fix_detail: proportional scaling when bull+bear>100; all 1610 combinations verified to sum to 100

mobile_safe_area_css.detail: env(safe-area-inset-top) applied to .app-ticker with box-sizing:content-box. viewport-fit:cover and black-translucent already set. Real device verification not done.

ticker_duplicates.double_render_note: intentional for seamless CSS scroll animation

browser_mobile_smoke.reason: Playwright Chromium download blocked by network restrictions in sandbox

production.reason: No live domain accessible from this environment

test_results.deselected_reason: fastapi not in sandbox; pass in CI Ubuntu runner

open_issues.issue: Social Radar bull+bear sum exceeded 100 (351/1610 combinations)
Veri yetersiz and Demo labels not in data-status.ts — dual label paths
Dashboard/ticker live threshold differs from buildDataStatusMeta (45s/90s vs 5min)
AssetDetailModal headerStatus assigns live on price arrival without TTL check
CI not run on HEAD (a614605) — no PR opened
Production NOT_RUN — no live domain access
